title: 📈 Classic Example
description: Standard case with multiple peaks; best container is between distant tall lines.

title: 🟰 All Same Heights
description: All heights equal; max water comes from farthest distance.

title: 📉 Strictly Decreasing
description: Heights decrease; optimal container not necessarily at extremes.

title: 📈 Strictly Increasing
description: Heights increase; best container balances width and smaller height.

title: 🎯 Two Elements Only
description: Minimum size input; only one possible container.

title: 🧱 Contains Zero Height
description: Zero heights act as no wall; best container ignores them.

title: 🏔️ Peaks in Middle
description: Tallest bars in middle; optimal solution balances distance and height.

title: 🪣 Wide but Short vs Narrow but Tall
description: Wider container with shorter height beats narrow tall option.

title: 🔻 Single Peak
description: Tallest bar alone is not enough; needs width for maximum area.

title: ⚖️ Symmetric Heights
description: Symmetry helps; outer equal heights give maximum area.
